micro_rules: Never invent service names outside the provided service_list_snippet.
Return exactly one JSON object only with keys name, cron, period, code.
Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.
Use only enum strings that appear in service_list_snippet for the selected service.

Set the air purifier to auto mode and switch to sleep mode after 2 hours.

Switch the TV to channel 7 and switch to channel 11 after 1 hour.
